title: Remove Active Tournaments Section & Sync Tournament Visibility + Slot Counts for All Players

requirements.text: Remove the 'Active Tournaments' section from the HomePage (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx). This section currently polls localStorage and displays up to 3 active tournaments. Eliminate it entirely so the homepage no longer shows any tournament listing or related polling logic.
acceptanceCriteria: The HomePage renders without any 'Active Tournaments' section or tournament cards
No polling interval for tournaments remains on the HomePage
The rest of the HomePage (hero, stats counter, etc.) continues to render correctly

requirements.text: Ensure that when an admin creates a tournament via the AdminPanelPage (frontend/src/pages/AdminPanelPage.tsx), the new tournament is immediately visible to all players on the TournamentsPage (frontend/src/pages/TournamentsPage.tsx). Use a combination of localStorage storage events and polling (every 3 seconds) to propagate changes across browser tabs/sessions so players see newly created tournaments without a manual page refresh.

quotes: when Admin create tournament then the all players see tournament

acceptanceCriteria: A tournament created by admin appears on the TournamentsPage within 3 seconds for any open player session
The TournamentsPage listens for localStorage 'storage' events and re-renders when tournaments are updated
Polling interval of 3 seconds is active on the TournamentsPage to catch updates

requirements.text: Ensure that when a player registers for a tournament (via frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx, which calls incrementTournamentSlots), all other players viewing the TournamentsPage and TournamentCard see the slot count increment by +1 in near real-time. The TournamentsPage and any tournament listing must reflect the updated slot count within the next polling cycle (≤3 seconds) using localStorage events and polling.

quotes: when player register tournament that makes by admin and all players see 1+ slots increased

acceptanceCriteria: After a player submits a registration, the tournament's registered slot count increases by 1 in the data store
The TournamentsPage reflects the updated slot count within 3 seconds for all open sessions
TournamentCard displays the current slot count accurately without requiring a manual page refresh
The incrementTournamentSlots utility in seedData.ts is correctly called on registration and persisted to localStorage

constraints: All data operations must remain localStorage-based; no backend changes are required
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Polling interval for tournament sync must not exceed 3 seconds
nonGoals: WebSocket or true real-time backend push notifications
Migrating tournament data storage from localStorage to the Motoko backend
Changes to the admin authentication or login flow
Modifying the leaderboard, payment, or contact pages
